title: This OpenSource Repo will 10X Your Hermes Agent
summary: Agent Reach is an open source repo that augments Hermes agents with web research capabilities across YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, X, and GitHub, plus data enrichment and contact verification via Clay integration. The system uses intelligent routing and multi-source research to reduce token usage while enabling automated lead discovery.
writeup: The video covers Agent Reach, an open source repo that extends Hermes agents with web research across YouTube, LinkedIn, Reddit, X, and GitHub, alongside data enrichment and contact verification through a Clay integration. It matters for anyone building agentic workflows aimed at automated lead discovery. Key takeaways: the system uses intelligent routing and multi-source research to cut token usage, and it combines search across multiple platforms with enrichment to surface and verify leads.
